name: A complete guide to Voice Search Optimization
rich_text_block:
As consumer behavior continues to shift in today's ever evolving digital world, voice search continuously grows as a preferred channel. What does that mean for businesses today? It means that conversational queries are becoming the new norm and your brand also needs to adopt this new channel of communication to remain competitive.

Studies indicate that by 2022, voice-enabled shopping is expected to grow from $2 billion to $40 billion in the US alone. The time for you to start mapping your voice search strategy is now.

Download this ebook to learn:

  1. Where voice search started and how it is transforming consumer search behavior
  2. The impact of voice search on industries like banking, financial services, retail, healthcare, etc.
  3. Why brands need to adopt a voice search strategy
  4. How to develop a voice search strategy for your brand

seo.title: A complete guide to Voice Search Optimization
